content.en:
Postwar.

Mi Tian Ji Venerable They came.

Obviously, the combat power displayed by Ye Tian this time has completely reached the first-grade Ultimate Realm main combat power, which belongs to the same level as them, maybe it is weaker, but it is not too weak.

Therefore, they naturally want to make good friends with Ye Tian.

And Mitian Jizun was the most surprised by Ye Tian's strength, the strength he showed last time was far less powerful, but now he showed such a terrifying strength, is it progressing too fast, or is it too deep hidden?

Of course, none of these issues matter at the moment.

"I've seen the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable!"

"I've seen the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable!"

"I've seen the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable!"

One by one, the first-grade Ultimate Realm Lords greeted Ye Tian.

Ye Tian also responded one by one, and everyone at least knew each other.

As for why Ye Tian's strength had improved so quickly, they naturally wouldn't ask more, every Ultimate Realm Lord had his own secrets, and asking about this kind of thing was undoubtedly offending people.

They're not stupid either!

Soon.

These Ultimate Realm Masters all went back, and Ye Tian also returned to his palace.

......

"I didn't expect the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable to break through to the first grade!"

Taiyuan Jizun frowned slightly.

He was actually very unhappy with the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, because the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable had robbed the Nine Divisions Realm Lord of the Way of the Blood Sea Ultimate System, so that the Nine Divisions Realm Lord could not break through to the Ultimate Realm Lord, and could only re-cultivate other paths.

The backer of the Nine Divisions Realm Lord is Tailing Jizun, and Tailing Jizun is his younger brother, he is Tailing Jizun's backer, and his strength is also very close to the first grade, but there is still a lot of gap.

Now, he didn't dare to offend the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable Ye Tian even more.

"I have to tell Tai Ling, he has always wanted to deal with the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable!"

Taiyuan Jizun said secretly.

It just so happened that he also had an incarnation in the outside world, and he could contact Tailing Jizun.

Sea of Dimensions.

Taishang Pavilion.

The incarnation of Taiyuan Jizun woke up and went to see Tailing Jizun for the first time.

"Tailing!"

Taiyuan Jizun shouted.

"Big brother, why did you use the incarnation?" Tailing Jizun wondered, could it be that something big had happened? Could it be that the Ultimate Dark Domain has been breached?

For a moment, he panicked.

Taiyuan Jizun said: "I used the incarnation this time to inform you of one thing, don't offend the Wanfa Jizun, and also warn the Nine Divisions, forget that thing." "

"Why?"

Tailing Jizun asked.

If the eldest brother doesn't help him, forget it, and let him not offend the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, doesn't this make him admit it?

"Because the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable is already a first-grade Ultimate Realm Lord, our entire Taishang Pavilion together is far from his opponent. Taiyuan Jizun said helplessly.

"What, the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable has become a first-grade Ultimate Realm Master? How is this possible, how long has he only broken through?"

Tailing Jizun didn't believe it at all.

Taiyuan Jizun smiled bitterly: "You don't believe it and can't help it, I saw it with my own eyes, he killed the ultimate creature comparable to the second grade in one instant with one sword, and its strength has indeed reached the first grade, if I fight him, it is estimated that a few moves will be severely damaged and even killed!"

Tailing Jizun was silent for a while, and then lowered his head, "Big brother, I know, I will never have the idea of offending Wanfa Jizun in the future." "

"Very good, you also warn the Nine Divisions Realm Master, if he is unwilling, then expel him, our Taishang Pavilion does not lack a Nine Realms Peak, and would rather give up than offend a first-grade Ultimate Realm Lord, do you understand?"

"Understood!"

Tai Ling replied with great respect.

Subsequently, the incarnation of Taiyuan Jizun continued to sleep.

Tailing Jizun immediately summoned the Nine Divisions Realm Lord.

"Lord Tailing Jizun!"

The Nine Divisions Realm Lord said respectfully.

Tailing Jizun looked at the Nine Divisions Realm Lord, sighed and said, "Nine Divisions, from today onwards, you don't provoke the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Masters, don't have the slightest idea, just forget about him snatching the Blood Sea Ultimate System." "

"Why?"

The Nine Divisions Realm Lord was not convinced, "Lord Tailing Jizun, did you make a deal with Wanfa Jizun?"

Rumble!!!!!

Tailing Jizun's aura exploded, directly pressing Jiu Si Jing to take the initiative, "Presumptuous, are you questioning me??"

"Don't dare!"

The Nine Divisions Realm Lord hurriedly said.

Tailing Jizun said coldly: "Don't talk about you, even I don't dare to offend the Ten Thousand Law Jizun, the other party is already a first-grade ultimate realm master." Maybe you don't quite understand the strength of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, our entire Taishang Pavilion's Ultimate Realm Lords are far inferior to the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Honorable when they shoot together. In the entire Dimensional Sea, among so many Ultimate Realm Lords, the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerables were already standing in the top ranks. "

"How could this be, it wasn't long since he broke through to the Ultimate Realm Lord?"

The Nine Divisions Realm Lord was dumbfounded.

"Don't think about this matter, you won't be able to catch up with the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable in your life, and don't make any small moves, otherwise the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable will kill you, and no Ultimate Realm Lord will protect you. Tailing Jizun reminded.

It took a long time for the Nine Divisions Realm Lord to come back to his senses, bowed his head and said, "I understand, I won't have any other thoughts in the future!"

Immediately, he walked out of here, and his figure slowly elongated, as if he was extremely lonely.

......

Ye Tian didn't know about the Taishang Pavilion, he had long forgotten what the Nine Divisions Realm Master was, after all, this was only an hour ago for him, and even the Blood Sea Ultimate System was temporarily abandoned by him, and he would slowly pick it up and cultivate it in the future.

Now, Ye Tian's main focus is on the Darkest Ultimate System, the Abyssal Star Ultimate System, and the Eternal Night Ultimate System, and the other Ultimate Systems are all behind.

Since he showed the combat power of the first-grade Ultimate Realm Lord (Li's), his authority on the side of the Ultimate Dark Domain has obviously increased significantly, and he often enters the Ultimate Dark Domain to collect resources, even if he encounters the most powerful Ultimate Creature, he has hope to get out of the way.

What's more, his ultimate creature copy body can go to harvest resources, and there is no danger at all.

As time passed, Ye Tian obtained more and more resources, and his strength was steadily improving.

"The liquid substance refined from this golden stone can actually enhance the ultimate will!"

Ye Tian found this substance somewhere in the Ultimate Dark Domain.

Chat with other Ultimate Realm Lords, and then you know the name of this stone - Dark Gold Ruins Stone!

The liquid substance extracted from the Dark Gold Ruin Stone is called the Dark Gold Ruin Liquid.

This kind of substance is a supreme treasure for the peak of the Nine Realms, and it can strengthen the Ultimate Will, so it will be much easier to break through to become the Ultimate Realm Lord.
